posts.author: BakerElara7
posts.text: Just spent three hours trying to perfect my sourdough starter again! It finally bubbled up beautifully this morning. Can't wait to bake the loaf tonight. #sourdough #baking
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about a hobby that promotes a positive community interest without violating any policies.

posts.author: ElaraMoss
posts.text: Honestly, the new council tax rates in Westbridge are absolutely ridiculous. I've been trying to fix my leaky faucet for weeks and now this? It feels like they just want everyone struggling. Time to save up for a rainy day instead of paying these bills! #WestbridgeCouncil
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with government policy (council tax) but contains no threat, targeted abuse, or harmful false claims; it is a natural opinion.

posts.author: OakhavenGuide
posts.text: Reminder: The Oakhaven Community Library will be closed for scheduled maintenance this Friday from 9am to 5pm. Staff will return on Saturday morning. We'll have a few new fiction titles ready by then! #communitylibrary #maintenance
posts.explanation: This is a benign public notice about library hours and maintenance in an approved fictional location, presenting no policy violations.
